title: Wasm type confusion due to custom descriptors spec unsoundness on `ref.func` exact typing
bounty_rationale: High-quality report with demonstration of RCE in a sandboxed process
description_snippet:
## README

This is *potentially* a Wasm spec-level unsoundness issue. However, there seem to be no public spec documenting how `ref.func` and other operations that yield references work in conjunction with custom descriptors. I am reporting this privately to Google Chrome/V8 as Google seems to be le
